notes: SHIP v1.14.336 - FINAL-LOOK (OPTION 2) PHONE assistant-first, ship 1 of the desktop+phone re-skin per SPEC-COMMAND-FINAL-LOOK.md. This is the PHONE surface; the desktop 3-region layout lands next (.337). All #pg-cmd-scoped -> ?legacy byte-identical; Master pipeline read-only; reh3d internals untouched (the .335 NEXT-U marker + hero-strip removal stand). D12 REVERSED per owner ruling: the assistant returns as a FUNCTIONAL card (not the old decorative floating ghost). SHIPPED: (1) AI ASSISTANT card #cc-asst - phantom-ghost-v2.webp + 'AI ASSISTANT / ONLINE' eyebrow + greeting + a HONEST situational summary #cc-asst-summary (site + blocker posture + live work signal; NO invented 'ahead of yesterday' trend - there is no history, fabricating one breaks the no-fake-telemetry law); the NBA orders in immediately below it = the phone's single NBA (one NBA per surface). (2) QUICK TOOLS card #cc-qtools (SCAN/LOG/BLOCKER, same onclick doors as the hero verbs). (3) status pills -> labeled chips (Online / Ready / Active check) with the tappable Profile chip on a 44px gloved hit; the ok/health dot is now mint --ok (clears the .335 rd-review teal->mint carry-forward). (4) phone (<1024px) reflow via flex order: Z0 pills -> assistant -> NBA -> stats -> rack (line/hero/vitals) -> quick tools; the .lens headline block + telemetry .trow + OPS SIGNAL are hidden on phone (superseded by the assistant card / are desktop bottom-cards). Card skin uses the REAL :root tokens --cyan-border-lo / --surf-1 / --surf-inset / --ok (NOT the spec's mock --edge-lo/--surf, owner-ruled 'real stylesheet wins'). Rulings honored: sparkline DROPPED (no fake telemetry; the honest progress bar lands with the desktop stat cards in .337); RACKS nav -> Rack Map (desktop .337). NOT-YET (deliberate, non-stranding): the 8-button .cmd-grid is KEPT below the new content (order 9) - the comp replaces it with QUICK TOOLS + desktop SUGGESTED ACTIONS, but trimming it would strand Brief (brief_show has no 2nd door) and Shift Report re-homes as the desktop 'Summarize shift' chip; the grid stays until the owner rules where Brief goes (open Z5 flag). DESKTOP (>=1024px) is UNCHANGED this ship - it still uses the old .278 column and lands the 3-region in .337; a desktop viewer sees the old Command look until then. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script x3, CSS brace net-0, sw.js ok, version.json valid, three-stamp .335->.336; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (installed PWA, HARD-REFRESH / clear SW first, iPhone): assistant card at top with ghost + real summary; NBA sits inside/below it (only one NBA); pills read Online/Ready/Active; rack + OPEN-via-tap + NEXT-U all still work from .335; QUICK TOOLS SCAN/LOG/BLOCKER reachable; S0 (no Master) still full-screen ingest only; ?legacy=1 pixel-identical. ROLLBACK: revert this commit (restores the .335 phone layout).
